all.en: Customer service queue, Tuesday afternoon, ticket number RA-48217
all.zh: 客服佇列，週二下午，工單編號 RA-48217

all.en: Subject line: Urgent return request for damaged shipment
all.zh: 主旨：受損貨件緊急退貨申請

all.en: Caller is Helena Marchetti from Northwind Logistics, account tier silver
all.zh: 來電者為 Northwind Logistics 的 Helena Marchetti，帳戶等級為銀級

all.en: Good afternoon, this is Brendan from customer care, how may I help
all.zh: 午安，我是客服中心的 Brendan，請問有什麼可以協助的

all.en: Hi Brendan, I need to initiate a return on order number 778-4451
all.zh: 嗨 Brendan，我需要為訂單編號 778-4451 申請退貨

all.en: Two of the twelve industrial pumps arrived with cracked housings
all.zh: 十二台工業泵浦中有兩台外殼破裂送達

all.en: I'm sorry to hear about the damage, let me pull up the order now
all.zh: 很抱歉發生損壞，我立即調出訂單資料

all.en: I can see the order was shipped from our Memphis warehouse last Thursday
all.zh: 我看到訂單於上週四從孟菲斯倉庫出貨

all.en: Could you share photos of the damaged units and the outer packaging
all.zh: 可否提供受損品項與外包裝的照片

all.en: I've already emailed eight photos to your support inbox this morning
all.zh: 我今早已將八張照片寄到您的支援信箱

all.en: Thank you, I can see them attached to the ticket now
all.zh: 謝謝，我看到照片已附在工單中

all.en: The packaging shows clear impact damage on the bottom-right corner
all.zh: 包裝右下角明顯有撞擊損傷

all.en: Based on the photos, this qualifies for our carrier-damage protocol
all.zh: 依照片判斷，本案符合運輸損壞處理流程

all.en: I'll need to escalate to my supervisor for return authorization above five thousand
all.zh: 金額超過五千美元的退貨需上呈主管核准

all.en: Could you please hold for approximately three minutes
all.zh: 可以麻煩您稍等大約三分鐘嗎

all.en: Of course, I appreciate you handling this promptly
all.zh: 當然，謝謝您迅速處理

all.en: Hi Marcus, I have a return authorization that needs your sign-off
all.zh: Marcus 您好，我有一筆退貨授權需要您核准

all.en: Order value is eleven thousand four hundred, two damaged units
all.zh: 訂單金額為一萬一千四百美元，兩台單品受損

all.en: The customer is Northwind Logistics, silver tier, repeat buyer since 2022
all.zh: 客戶為 Northwind Logistics，銀級，自 2022 年起回購

all.en: Carrier was Apex Freight, photos confirm external impact damage
all.zh: 承運業者為 Apex Freight，照片證實外部撞擊損壞

all.en: Okay, who's absorbing the return shipping cost on this one
all.zh: 好的，這次退貨運費由誰吸收

all.en: Standard policy puts carrier-damage freight on the shipper, which is us
all.zh: 標準政策規定運輸損壞由出貨方吸收，也就是我方

all.en: However, we can file a claim with Apex under our master agreement
all.zh: 不過我們可依主合約向 Apex 提出索賠

all.en: Approved, generate the RMA and waive the restocking fee
all.zh: 核准，請開立退貨單並豁免重新上架費

all.en: Also send the courtesy replacement on expedited two-day shipping
all.zh: 並以兩日加急運送方式寄出補償替換品

all.en: Make sure the freight claim is filed within forty-eight hours
all.zh: 務必於四十八小時內提出運費索賠

all.en: Understood, I'll loop in the logistics team after this call
all.zh: 了解，通話結束後我會通知物流團隊

all.en: Thank you for waiting, Helena, I have good news to share
all.zh: Helena 感謝您耐心等候，有好消息告訴您

all.en: Your return has been fully authorized under reference RMA-90332
all.zh: 您的退貨已完全核准，編號為 RMA-90332

all.en: We will cover return freight and waive any restocking charges
all.zh: 我們將承擔退貨運費並豁免重新上架費用

all.en: Replacement units will ship today on two-day expedited service
all.zh: 替換品今日將以兩日加急方式出貨

all.en: You should receive them by Friday before five PM local time
all.zh: 您應可於週五當地時間下午五點前收到

all.en: That's a tremendous help, our production line was concerned about delays
all.zh: 這幫助太大了，我們生產線原本擔心延誤

all.en: I completely understand, minimizing your downtime is our priority
all.zh: 我完全理解，將您的停機時間降至最低是我們的首要目標

all.en: A prepaid return label will arrive in your inbox within the hour
all.zh: 預付退貨標籤將於一小時內寄到您的信箱

all.en: Please affix it to the original carton and schedule a pickup
all.zh: 請貼於原包裝箱上並安排取件

all.en: Apex Freight will collect Wednesday between nine and twelve
all.zh: Apex Freight 將於週三上午九點至十二點間取件

all.en: Do I need to drain residual fluids from the pumps before shipping
all.zh: 退運前是否需排除泵浦內殘留液體

all.en: Yes, please drain and seal both intake and outlet ports
all.zh: 是的，請排空並密封進水口與出水口

all.en: Our warehouse cannot accept untreated returns due to safety regulations
all.zh: 因安全法規，我們倉庫無法接收未處理的退貨品

all.en: Got it, I'll have our facilities team handle that this evening
all.zh: 了解，今晚我會請廠務團隊處理

all.en: Is there anything else I can assist you with today
all.zh: 今天還有其他需要協助的事項嗎

all.en: Could you confirm whether this affects our volume discount tier
all.zh: 可否確認此事是否影響我們的數量折扣等級

all.en: Excellent question, returns from carrier damage do not count against volume
all.zh: 好問題，運輸損壞退貨不計入數量門檻

all.en: Your silver tier status remains unaffected through the calendar year
all.zh: 您的銀級身份在本年度內不受影響

all.en: I'll send a written confirmation along with the RMA documentation
all.zh: 我會連同退貨單一併寄出書面確認

all.en: Wonderful, please copy our accounts payable team on that email
all.zh: 太好了，請將該郵件副本給我們的應付帳款團隊

all.en: Absolutely, I have their distribution list on file already
all.zh: 沒問題，他們的群組信箱已存檔

all.en: I'd like to apologize once more for the inconvenience this caused
all.zh: 再次為此事造成的不便致歉

all.en: Brendan, you've handled this beautifully, thank you sincerely
all.zh: Brendan，您處理得非常好，誠摯感謝

all.en: It's my pleasure, that's exactly what we're here for
all.zh: 這是我的榮幸，這正是我們存在的意義

all.en: I'll mark the ticket resolved pending replacement delivery confirmation
all.zh: 我會將工單標示為待替換品送達確認後結案

all.en: A satisfaction survey will arrive after the case fully closes
all.zh: 案件完全結案後將寄出滿意度調查

all.en: We genuinely value your feedback for ongoing service improvements
all.zh: 我們真心重視您的回饋以持續改善服務

all.en: Have a wonderful rest of your afternoon, Helena
all.zh: Helena，祝您下午愉快
